_doc: Per-node OpenRouter (or other gateway) model assignment for mm-agent. Looked up by node id (node-NN). Falls back to MM_DEFAULT_MODEL in .env if missing.
_why_per_node: Running different models on different nodes lets the swarm forum reflect a diverse set of perspectives — useful when the queen synthesizes patterns. If you don't care, set them all to the same model (or just use the default).
